content.full_text:
NETTING STOCKS OVERSIZED ON MARGIN 8/2030

State of California

Memorandum

To : Opinion request meeting participants                    Date : Dec. 16, 1976

From : FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
       Ken Finney

Subject: Item for Discussion:


                    How to value stocks purchased on
                    margin for purposes of disclosing
                    investments.




The value of all stock, not just equity value,

must be reported. Loans received from Brokerage

firm must be reported as income.


(17)
